statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); task_prefix=""; command -v alt > /dev/null 2>&1 && task_prefix=$(alt statusline 2>/dev/null); short_cwd="${cwd/#$HOME/~}"; IFS='/' read -ra PARTS <<< "$short_cwd"; [ ${#PARTS[@]} -gt 3 ] && short_cwd=".../${PARTS[-2]}/${PARTS[-1]}"; git_info=""; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "detached"); staged=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff --cached --numstat 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); unstaged=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff --numstat 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); untracked=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); git_parts=""; [ "$staged" -gt 0 ] && git_parts="${git_parts}+${staged} "; [ "$unstaged" -gt 0 ] && git_parts="${git_parts}!${unstaged} "; [ "$untracked" -gt 0 ] && git_parts="${git_parts}?${untracked} "; [ -n "$git_parts" ] && git_info=" [git]: ${branch} ${git_parts}" || git_info=" [git]: ${branch}"; fi; context_info=""; usage=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.current_usage'); if [ "$usage" != "null" ]; then current=$(echo "$usage" | jq '.input_tokens + .cache_creation_input_tokens + .cache_read_input_tokens'); size=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.context_window_size'); [ "$size" -gt 0 ] && pct=$((current * 100 / size)) && context_info="${pct}%"; fi; model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""'); agent=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.agent.name // ""'); model_info=""; [ -n "$model" ] && model_info=" [${model}]"; agent_info=""; [ -n "$agent" ] && agent_info=" (agent: ${agent})"; printf "%s %s%s%s%s%s" "$context_info" "$task_prefix" "$short_cwd" "$git_info" "$model_info" "$agent_info"
